name: private-chat
description: Open-source, self-hostable customer chat for organizations — E2E or managed conversations, store/marketplace widget, agent dashboard — plus the original private E2E chat.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=widget
